workflow_id.description: Required. The Temporal workflow_id to signal.

run_id.description: Optional. Specific run_id of the workflow execution. When omitted, the server targets the latest run.

signal_name.description: Required. The name of the signal handler registered via workflow.SetSignalHandler in the target workflow.

args.description: Optional positional args delivered to the signal handler. Omit (or send an empty array) when the handler takes no arguments. Signals are NOT idempotent — re-sending the same signal triggers a separate handler invocation each time.
